slogan: Visual workflow automation for HR operations
details: Built and maintained a workflow automation platform where HR teams define process flows on a visual canvas, configure validation rules, and manage approval criteria. Delivered Angular 21 features with Signals and NgRx, and supported backend integrations for reliable production usage.
Built features for a multi-tenant attendance and reporting platform, including configurable reports, tenant-specific module behavior, and localized date handling with BS calendar support.

Contributed to core modules of a hospital management system, including billing, accounts, pharmacy, inventory, and lab workflows. Focused on API integrations, role-based access control, and reliable delivery for large-scale operations.

slogan: Reusable date package for Nepali calendar workflows
details: Built a reusable Nepali BS date picker with TypeScript and Rollup, and integrated it across multiple frontend apps to standardize localized date input behavior.

slogan: Custom software for unbiased data collection
details: Built custom data-collection software for Tilganga Hospital's research project. Used .NET and SQL Server to implement multiple forms and validation logic to collect study data across districts in Nepal.

project_name: Analysis of Rabin Karp and Knuth Morris Pratt Algorithm for Plagiarism Detection
details: Built a Next.js app (team of three) to estimate plagiarism degree using Rabin–Karp and KMP with a user-defined threshold. Applied Porter stemming for text processing and used Axios-based web scraping to generate source text for comparison.
Built a real-time chat app where users can connect with strangers while staying anonymous. Implemented topic-based matching and identity-safe messaging flows using Socket.IO.
Built a dynamic e-commerce site where users can browse products, add items to cart, and check out. Implemented admin workflows for managing categories/products, plus search and filtering.
